title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. crestense
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. crestense, also known as Crested Hawk's-beard, is a plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. crestense include its possible use in treating digestive issues and its potential to support immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, often used in traditional medicine, although commercial availability and standardization may be limited.
